text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, isn't that Agnes Tachyon? She recently
sparked a lot of controversy on the internet.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, that's her. I was interested, so I watched
the footage of the Kikuka Sho. She performed
pretty well actually.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
She surprised the crowd at the Kikuka Sho, but
the question is—how will she fare today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon lets out a carefree yawn, paying
no heed to the surrounding chatter.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Tsk tsk, silly guinea pig. I appear relaxed because
I am focused.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've been employing various breathing and muscle
relaxation techniques to ease both my mind and
body.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It is a proven type of mental training built on the
foundation of sports science.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, today brings the first of our
long-awaited goal races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I got your hopes up back then, so it only makes
sense that I prove my hypothesis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As compensation for accompanying me along this
journey beyond limits, I'll reward you with a few
victories.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, then, let's hear your plans for my senior
year schedule. I'm all ears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She promised me that just a few days after the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She responds with a shrewd grin.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit. So you just sit back, relax, and
enjoy the show!
